postToolUse.bash: git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -q -m "auto-write $(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S): $(git diff --cached --name-only | tr '\n' ' ')"

sessionEnd.bash: bash _harness/scripts/check_ticket_log.sh; git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -q -m "auto-session-end $(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S): $(git diff --cached --name-only | tr '\n' ' ')"
